Execute a non-interactive Codex task.

Usage: codex exec [OPTIONS] [PROMPT]

Options:
  -C, --cd <DIR>                 Working directory for the agent
  -s, --sandbox <MODE>           Sandbox mode (workspace-write, read-only, ...)
      --json                     Emit JSONL events
  -o, --output-last-message <FILE>
                                 Write the agent's final message to a file
  -h, --help                     Print help

PROMPT is passed as a trailing positional argument when provided.
